MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
*No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT ALBERT (MONTY) MONTGOMERY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Granted re: 2d & 3d causes of action, and prayers for relief of those causes of action. Granted re: prayer for relief of 4th cause of action. Plaintiff has leave to amend the 4th cause of action only, to plead fraud and deceit or intentional misrepresentation if can do so in good faith. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR # 4780 (DAG/301/CW)
